We've enjoyed a lengthy partnership with SummitTrek and consider it an honor to create tools for their coaching practice that bring lasting impact in the lives and businesses of their clients. We help communicate on their behalf by way of brand re-design, monthly workbooks, email newsletters, assorted print materials and websites. Summit is in the business of transforming and restoring lives and businesses to their original intended purpose and we love helping them do that.

Summit makes use of carefully curated quotes throughout their materials. When we recently re-designed their brand we made sure to identify a font that felt authentically hand written, to give the personal touch whenever short quotes are displayed.

We've created a comprehensive system of tools, worksheets, workbooks all with a simple minimalistic aesthetic. We never want the design to get in the way of the process or the meaningful exercises the user is experiencing.
One of the most impactful Summit offerings is the Life Planning Retreat. The weekend is an opportunity to Rekindle Your Passions. Discover Your Purpose and Live Differently.
our process is found in restoring leaders and organizations to their original intened purpose through coaching

Medical Solutions of Texas is a Service Disabled Veteran Owned Business (SDVOSB) that acts as the bridge between medical supply companies and the Department of Defense and VA hospitals. They have the connections and experience to help private companies sell their medical suplies and solutions to the government.

MSOT's lacked a brand, identity and website that looked legitimate in the eyes of the medical community or the military end user. So, we developed a brand that was inspired by stenciled and angular military lettering and logistics shipping containers. The brand uses a color palette sampled from camoflauge and carries with it that tactical "we get it done" mentality.
The lettering is distinctive, simple and no nonsense.

The MSOT website is a place for medical supply sales reps to understand how to sell to the government. Pages help the view understand how MSOT helps clarify a complex process. We featured "end users." The ultimate recipients of the  medical care offered and featured them over the lifetime of military service from new recruits, to growing families all the way up to retired and aging combat veterans.
Our websites are always designed and programmed with desktop, laptop, tablet and mobile experiences in mind.
putting while someone else holds a branded flag

After a life-changing experiencing at a Youth Peace Camp in Serbia, founder Shane Hanson knew his purpose was to create a non-profit that served Foster Youth through sports, mentorship, and training. Due to the deeply flawed foster care system,  many children who need safe and secure environments are left with a lack of structure and resources. Freedom Youth Foundation was created to help fill that gap along side a community of amazing volunteers and sponsors. They care for thousands of foster kids each year in California, Idaho and Mexico.
With a brand that has good standing within the communities they serve, it was important to honor the intent of FYF's original logo.
Once a concise look and feel was created, we quickly developed all collateral for their day-to-day operations, marketing, and events.
In a recent fundraising event, we donated our services to create branded and marketing materials for a golf tournament.
branded signs for each golf hole
hero image of putting with flag
CXO Visionaries Customer Stories RFP Examples
Below are relevant projects for your enjoyment.

One for one example of the project for the UX / UI and content. We value collaboration which means we prioritize clear communication and project management. We have experience working with cyber security professionals.

We understand the pressures executives face in having a trustworthy and reliable image when managing a large corporation. The Chief Executive Office managed 100,000 employees as well delivering services to over 10M people, they understood the brand was visual representation of their professionalism and ability to deliver.

The size of organization and the deliverable request. They manage the media spend for Hyundia and Kia, more than $1B and have offices across the US. Beyond the typical web design, brand guidelines and requirements, they wanted to a premium lifestyle brand.

Fluid brand identity whose personality stands on its own yet allows the individual artists it represents bring the color and life to the brand, not unlike the CXO Personalities. Practically, the web solution delivers a beautiful experience using a similar stack as the RFP requirements with all its content being pushed by a CMS.

Broad scope of the brand identity with many deliverables, including a campaign for LinkedIn that we delivered a turnkey solution. Helping the client stay relevant and aware of social media trends to create marketing pieces that translate food for thought to forward thinking.

With a clear alignment of goals and expectations, this website successfully achieved reviving a dying brand and service, going from hundreds of hits a week to thousands with 371k visits in the last 12 months. The largest percentage of traffic using a search feature that we developed connecting their database of 25,000 dentists.
Developing a comprehensive design system that works across many deliverables and mediums–digital, print, and signage–creating consistency and confidence for Revogen's customers and internal team.
UX / UI for IT Security Company
Chief Executive Office of LA County
The “buck stops here” with a branding system for Los Angeles County's CEO

The CEO’s office carries out the business of the county and initiatives set forth by an elected Board of Supervisors. They required a brand that communicated confidently as a public department with the operational complexity, scope and budget that exceed many corporations.

Reddoor went through an extensive RFP process and was ultimately selected by the County to design a logo and develop a system that could help bring consistency across the large organization. As we dug into public stats about the County of Los Angeles we discovered the staggering size of the county and its infrastructure. You can see by the data below (as of 2023-2024), the County of Los Angeles truly rivals the size of states and even some countries:

Here's the text from the Los Angeles County infographic: County of Los Angeles POPULATION 9,539,730 Serves more residents than 40 States BUDGETED POSITIONS 115,324 48th largest employer if fortune 500 company ADOPTED BUDGET FOR 2023-24 $46.7 B Larger budget than 35 states ALONGSIDE THE Top 20 countries in the world for GDP

The logo was born out of a modern monogram/seal concept. It needed to hold its own next to the LA County seal while also living in harmony with it. We wanted to communicate the dual nature of being a public department operating at the scale of a major corporation. The brand's boldness is meant to stand confidently beside any Fortune 100 company.

“The buck stops here.” was a phrase our team used internally when discussing how the Chief Executive Office is uniquely positioned in the County's overall structure. They are the final authority on budget recommendations before they are submitted to the Board of Supervisors. Design decisions led us to a visually distinct and strong red period signifying the “final word.”
ceo logo for all different departments
These guidelines are extensive, not only showing logo usage, color palettes and collateral examples but also giving guidance for department and initiative application of the brand.

The CEO is in charge of implementing the Board of Supervisors' ambitious policy agenda. We needed a visual system that could help give the initiatives efficient and professional branding out of the gate.
other initiatives using the branding scheme

Since the CEO's office communicates with a wide range of internal and external audiences about the budget and other key priorities, a customized set of icons was developed to provide maximum clarity and flexibility.
front on image of a car between buildings
A media company wanting everyone to know they saw the world as an opportunity.

We worked with a great team at Innocean Worldwide USA, to create a visionary brand identity for CANVAS Worldwide, from scratch, stand-alone global media agency. CANVAS is a joint venture between INNOCEAN Worldwide and Horizon Media.

CANVAS represents the ability to generate custom-designed solutions for the ever-changing advertising landscape and needed to embody a spirit of creativity and curiosity. The company's philosophy is that given a blank canvas they can use imagination to achieve almost anything. We want people to see the brand as a fresh, creative, innovative new player. People should feel intrigued inspired, and curious to explore.

We wanted to create a brand that is meaningful, differentiated and flexible. So we explored wordmarks, symbols and numerous combinations that pushed the viewer to think and interact. Ideas ranged from broad brush strokes that would take on the content of the media clients to an abstract C that would be a portal to new media ideas and solutions.

The best solution, which was internally dubbed as "the implied frame," embodied the brand and its values in the most complete way. Meant to be less commercial and more avant garde or fashion-forward. This idea is based on an abstract frame that contains any and all possible content, which creates the implied canvas. The frame itself is derived from the cross strokes of the "A" letterforms. The final result is a minimal solution that invites the viewer to engage with the brand.

The first round of conceptual ideas was met with a standing ovation from the client's leadership. Approval of creative concepts have come quickly and the client is excited to showcase the brand in the launch of CANVAS and during the hiring process. Forthcoming CANVAS Worldwide launch anticipated for January 01, 2016. All the samples below are due to the great collaboration from the team at Innocean USA: 

Creative direction/writing - Chris Halas 
Associate Creative Director - Tricia Ting 
Art Director - Eric Stevens 
Website User Experience - Damien Dalli, Jon Farjo
Sample screens from the brand guidance document.
We create, value, and celebrate good design.
The Canvas logo's "implied frame" became a leading element in the entire system, creating a continuous and consistent personality in the design.
An important aspect of vision for Canvas was that it could translate as a high-end lifestyle brand. Here is a select collection of those executions.

We partnered Gallery Sonder to build a brand representative of their immersive, community-oriented space for artists and enthusiasts. Our collaborative effort resulted in a beautiful and bold design that invites you into the unique narrative of each individual artist.
big geometric sculpture and wall art
The brand is developed around the concept of a portal that allows for a peek into the art, but expands into an immersive experience.
extended versions of each letter in both directions
all the artist names with their art put in an extended letter
We approached all branded materials with the intention of creating a feeling of intrigue, through keyholes, and immersion, through expanding and revealing elements.
To focus on the artists and their forthcoming show, invitations represent a peek into the artwork, showing a cropped and detailed portion of a piece.
To complete the experience, we created signage engaging passersby on foot and by car.
After much anticipation, Gallery Sonder celebrated its opening night November 2024. The gallery will be a showcase for fresh, up and coming talent.
A production studio for healthcare strategy.
With great success, Strategy Advantage has grown into a forward thinking studio in the healthcare industry. They needed a brand to match.

Strategy Advantage acts as partners for healthcare leaders who need help navigating through the challenges of their industry. The new brand was developed to reflect the process in which they take their clients from disarray and chaos, to calm and effective solutions. To visually communicate navigating their clients from chaos to calm, or dark to light all with sense of balance we take you behind the scenes a bit and show you the creative process that makes that a reality.
more logo sketches with refined marks to the right
refined marks in different color schemes
As guides to healthcare professionals, Strategy Advantages logo was developed with the journey they provide towards innovative healthcare solutions in mind.
The best brands have a story worth telling
They deserve to be recognized, so we arm them with clear stories and compelling design that allows them to stand out and succeed.
Following a StoryBrand model, we collaborated to create their story and paired it with clear and compelling design.
The process is integral to Strategy Advantage's business. Their website reflects that through scrolling elements that lead into each page.
Custom animated infographics to help communication the value proposition that Strategy Advantage offers their clients.
With a team of professionals on hand, materials for conferences and meetings are consistently branding for Strategy Advantage.
An improved website experience for a dental referral service.

1-800-DENTIST is a fixture in the dental space, with over 25,000 dentists in their referral network. We created a compelling website to guide patients towards making the best decision for their dental health.
With a common vision, we developed a brand that is reflective of Revogen's innovative and high-quality products that help patients heal.
